action_items.description: Build AI catalog flow using AirOps to scrape websites and generate content
Review feedback from 5 hour workshop with 33 attendees
Streamline flow building process and implement approval workflow for marketing team
Request more native integrations from AirOps team, especially with go-to-market systems like Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach
Onboard more marketing team members to use AirOps, starting with technical members first
